fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Ply Gem Aluminum Clad Windows

  • Classic to Bold Color Options. From natural shades to vibrant colors, an extensive portfolio of 46 exterior colors allows you to truly set your project apart.
  • Maximize Daylighting. Experience more natural light and wide open views with a large glass area.
  • Design Flexibility. Solid wood interiors can be stained or painted to match other finishes inside the home. Choose matching hardware or decorative metallic finishes to beautifully complement a home’s drawer pulls, faucets and lighting.
  • Built to Last. Durable extruded aluminum exterior protects wood from the elements while offering low maintenance and long-lasting beauty.
  • Impact-resistance. MIRA double hung, casement, awning, picture and geometric shape windows have been tested and approved by the Florida Building Code for high winds and wind-borne debris in coastal areas.
  • Reduced Energy Costs. Enjoy reduced energy costs and year-round comfort with advanced glass packages that provide up to four times the energy efficiency of clear, single-glazed glass.
  • Insect and Moisture-resistance. Solid wood is vacuum-treated to resist rotting and water damage for years of dependable beauty and performance.
  • Charming Curb Appeal. Architecturally inspired grille profiles and patterns allow you to accentuate a home’s design.

‍

Why Choose All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows

All Weather Architectural Aluminum windows are designed for architects, builders, and homeowners who demand precision, performance, and modern design. Crafted entirely from architectural-grade aluminum, these windows offer sleek profiles, structural strength, and long-term durability in even the harshest environments.

Engineered for expansive glass and narrow sightlines, All Weather windows create seamless indoor-outdoor connections and maximize natural light—ideal for contemporary and custom architectural projects.

Available in both non-thermally broken and thermally broken frame systems, these windows offer solutions for a wide range of climates, including energy-efficient performance that meets California Title 24 requirements and beyond.

Every unit is custom-built to order, allowing for complete design freedom. Choose from a variety of window types—including casement, awning, fixed, sliding, and specialty shapes—with options for anodized or powder-coated finishes, high-performance glazing, and integrated hardware.

Built in California with a reputation for craftsmanship and innovation, All Weather windows deliver the performance you need and the aesthetics you want—without compromise.

Why Choose Western Window Systems Aluminum Windows

Western Window Systems aluminum windows are designed for modern living—offering expansive views, clean lines, and unmatched design flexibility. Engineered with strength, simplicity, and sophistication in mind, these windows bring high-performance solutions to both residential and commercial spaces.

Crafted from high-quality aluminum, these windows provide slim profiles and large glass areas that maximize natural light and blur the boundary between indoors and out. Their minimalist aesthetic makes them ideal for contemporary architecture and open-concept designs.

Available in both classic aluminum and thermally broken aluminum options, Western Window Systems windows are built to perform in a variety of climates—delivering energy efficiency, durability, and smooth operation even in extreme conditions.

From fixed and casement to awning, hopper, and sliding configurations, every window is fully customizable with your choice of sizes, finishes, hardware, and performance glass options.

Backed by commercial-grade construction and extensive design freedom, Western Window Systems aluminum windows offer the perfect balance of form and function—for projects that demand light, scale, and modern beauty.

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Alside Vinyl Windows

Alside vinyl windows are designed to deliver long-lasting performance, energy savings, and timeless style—making them a smart investment for both new construction and window replacement projects.

Crafted from premium, multi-chambered vinyl, these windows provide superior thermal insulation, structural strength, and resistance to warping, cracking, or fading—ensuring a low-maintenance finish that holds up for years.

Available in a variety of series—including Mezzo®, Sheffield®, and Fusion®—Alside vinyl windows can be tailored to fit your home’s architectural style, energy-efficiency goals, and budget.

With features like fusion-welded frames, Low-E glass, Argon gas fills, and optional impact-resistant reinforcement, Alside windows help lower energy bills and enhance year-round indoor comfort.

Backed by over 75 years of American manufacturing and strong limited lifetime warranties, Alside vinyl windows offer trusted performance, attractive design, and everyday reliability—without the hassle of constant upkeep.

Why Choose Andersen Fiberglass Windows

Andersen fiberglass windows are designed for strength, stability, and modern performance—ideal for homeowners who want long-lasting durability with a clean, contemporary aesthetic.

Offered in the A-Series, Andersen’s fiberglass windows feature a composite exterior made from fiberglass and Fibrex®—engineered to withstand extreme weather, resist corrosion, and maintain their shape and finish over time.

These windows combine the sleek look of fiberglass with a wood interior for added warmth and design flexibility. The result is a window that performs in all climates while blending beautifully into any home style.

With high energy efficiency, sound reduction, and a wide range of customization options—including colors, hardware, and grille patterns—Andersen fiberglass windows deliver performance without compromise.

Backed by Andersen’s proven legacy and robust warranty coverage, these windows are a trusted choice for those who want strength, beauty, and peace of mind in one complete package.

Andersen aluminum windows offer sleek, modern design combined with commercial-grade strength and durability. Ideal for contemporary architecture and large openings, these windows deliver clean lines, narrow profiles, and expansive glass views.

Available in the E-Series product line, Andersen’s aluminum-clad windows feature a wood interior for warmth and beauty, paired with a strong, low-maintenance aluminum exterior that resists the elements with ease.

Engineered for precision and performance, Andersen aluminum windows can be customized in a wide range of shapes, sizes, colors, and finishes—including anodized and custom-matched options to suit any design vision.

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Andersen Vinyl Windows

Andersen vinyl windows offer a blend of affordability, durability, and energy efficiency—perfect for homeowners seeking low-maintenance performance without sacrificing quality or style.

Available in the Andersen 100 Series, these windows are made with Fibrex® composite material, which is twice as strong as standard vinyl and resists fading, warping, and cracking far better than traditional PVC.

With clean lines, narrow frames, and a modern aesthetic, Andersen vinyl windows allow more glass and natural light—while offering long-term durability and thermal performance.

Unlike standard vinyl, Fibrex® contains 40% reclaimed wood fiber by weight, giving you the look and feel of wood with the low-maintenance benefits of vinyl.

Designed for energy efficiency and built to meet or exceed ENERGY STAR® standards, Andersen vinyl windows help reduce energy bills and increase indoor comfort year-round.

Backed by Andersen’s strong reputation and warranty support, these windows are a smart, lasting investment for any home.

Why Choose Andersen Wood Windows

Andersen wood windows combine the natural warmth of real wood with advanced engineering for timeless beauty and long-lasting performance. Crafted with care and attention to detail, these windows bring character, charm, and architectural richness to any home.

Protected by durable exterior cladding—available in aluminum or fiberglass—Andersen wood windows offer the best of both worlds: a classic wood interior that can be stained or painted to match your style, and a tough, low-maintenance exterior built to withstand the elements.

Available in Andersen’s A-Series, 400 Series, and E-Series product lines, these windows are designed for flexibility, with a wide range of sizes, shapes, colors, and grille patterns to suit both traditional and modern aesthetics.

Energy-efficient glass options, weather-resistant materials, and precision-built frames help reduce drafts and energy costs—while maintaining year-round comfort.

Backed by over a century of craftsmanship and industry-leading warranties, Andersen wood windows are a trusted choice for homeowners, architects, and builders seeking elegance, performance, and durability.

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Italwindows Wood Windows

Italwindows wood windows combine natural warmth with precision craftsmanship to create windows that are both timeless and high-performing. Each unit reflects the Italian tradition of elegant design, made to enhance the beauty and comfort of your home.

Crafted from carefully selected, sustainably sourced wood species, Italwindows wood frames offer rich textures, natural insulation, and the ability to be finished in custom stains or paints to match any interior style.

‍

WOOD

‍

For wood windows and doors we work with different Italian suppliers using different kind of wood and finishing. Our windows are adaptable to any architectural solution because of the wide range of materials and configurations available to choose from.

The high quality dried laminated wood used to create the window, guarantees excellent noise and thermal insulation. Insulating glass comes standard to maximize comfort in any room during any season.

‍

‍

‍

WOOD ALUMINIUM

‍

Engineered with modern performance in mind, these windows feature advanced sealing systems, multi-layered glazing, and optional aluminum cladding for added protection—ensuring long-lasting beauty with minimal maintenance.

Perfect for both classic and contemporary spaces, Italwindows wood windows bring softness, character, and a sense of authenticity to any architectural project.

Made to order, with unmatched attention to detail, these windows are more than functional—they are a design statement built to last.

‍

‍

‍

WOOD BRONZE

‍

For wood aluminum and bronze we use from many years German know-how joints with Italian design and international experience matured in Italy, Spain, Greece, Middle East, USA and AUS. The hybrid project came about which combines the traditional beauty and the warmth of the usage of wood, with the application of an external cladding which provide great resistance. We mean this top quality product could be nice for hospitals, hotels, schools and offices but even for high level residential projects

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Italwindows Steel Windows

Italwindows steel windows represent the perfect fusion of industrial strength and refined elegance. With ultra-slim profiles and unmatched structural rigidity, they create bold architectural statements while delivering long-lasting performance.

Crafted from high-grade, thermally broken steel, these windows offer exceptional durability, energy efficiency, and resistance to warping or corrosion—making them ideal for both residential and commercial projects.

Steel's inherent strength allows for narrow frames and expansive glass, offering unobstructed views and clean, modern lines. Italwindows enhances this with precision Italian craftsmanship and meticulous attention to detail.

Available in custom finishes, glazing options, and opening styles, Italwindows steel windows can be tailored to complement everything from historic renovations to minimalist new builds.

Built to perform and designed to inspire, Italwindows steel windows bring timeless character, maximum light, and structural excellence to every space.

‍

STEEL AND STAINLESS STEEL

‍

Elegant narrow sightlines, superior strenght and durability, quality craftmanship, unparalleled security. These are just some of the feature that make steel windows and doors an ideal choice for residential application.Steel windows and doors will add beaty and lasting value to residential projects. Steel windows and doors are also utilized in office buildings, transit facilities, banks, parking structures, post offices, and other commercial buildings.

Steel has always been manufactured offsite using standardised components. As such, it delivers the benefits of modern methods of construction such as zero waste, speed, high quality, repeatability, reduced cost and improved health and safety.

‍

‍

‍

Steel profiles can make your home more elegant. Due to the excellent structural properties, even large units can be constructed with slim profiles.

Profiles made from stainless steel are a particular highlight. With their weather-resistant and polished surface finishes, they endow your home with a special sheen.

Since older homes are often fitted with steel windows, steel is often the first choice for renovation projects.

Large, window constructions and a comprehensive range of fittings and accessories plus a wide variety of units and opening types offer countless ways by which to create a steel system exactly in accordance with your needs and desires.

‍

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Italwindows Aluminum Windows

Italwindows aluminum windows combine modern design, exceptional durability, and European engineering to deliver a sleek, high-performance solution for today’s architectural needs.

Crafted with slim sightlines and strong structural integrity, these windows allow for expansive glass areas and minimal visual interruption—perfect for maximizing natural light and capturing panoramic views.

Engineered with thermally broken frames and high-efficiency glazing, Italwindows aluminum systems provide outstanding insulation, helping to regulate indoor temperatures and reduce energy consumption year-round.

Available in a wide range of finishes, configurations, and opening styles, each window is custom-made to meet your design vision—whether you're building a minimalist home or a contemporary commercial space.

Resistant to corrosion, warping, and weathering, Italwindows aluminum windows are built to perform in even the most demanding environments—offering long-term value with minimal maintenance.

‍

ALUMINIUM

For aluminum windows and facade we work with the best systems in the world as Schüco, Reynaers and Aluprof.

In this case we can supply aluminum facade and windows with top thermal break aluminum at very good price/quality report and also rain screen in aluminum, corten, equitone, wood and other external materials.

Italwindows offers you a wide range of materials, systems, designs and colours. Thanks to the latest system technology, compromises with respect to light penetration and thermal insulation, appearance and design are a thing of the past.

Italwindows combine quality, design and innovation in an almost unlimited range, and already meet today the requirements of tomorrow. Sophisticated technology is the basis for all important factors, such as security, energy savings, noise reduction and thermal insulation, and – not least – easy care and maintenance. Give your living area a special atmosphere and enjoy the comfort of high-quality windows systems.

Aluminium profiles are characterised by an especially wide-ranging choice of design and their extreme durability. Due to their rigidity, they are often used for entrance doors. Likewise for sliding doors, aluminium profiles are often the first choice since they offer both an elegant appearance and easy operation. The high level of security features is another argument in their favour.

Ever since the introduction of thermally broken profiles, the problems frequently found in the past of condensation are no longer an issue. In addition, the choice of possible surface finishes and colours is largest for this type of profile.

‍

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Milgard Aluminum Windows

Light yet strong, aluminum-clad windows resist weathering and corrosion, ensuring long-lasting performance and maintaining their appearance over time. Aluminum frames also require minimal upkeep, saving you maintenance time and effort.

Architects and homeowners alike are drawn to the timeless appeal of aluminum windows’ slim profile. It allows for larger panes of glass and maximizes natural light and views while offering a sleek, modern aesthetic.

The versatility of aluminum windows means they can be configured into a wide variety of combinations. From aluminum sliding windows to casement styles and more, they can be customized to fit any size or style.

With advancements in technology, aluminum windows now feature thermal breaks that significantly improve insulation, reducing energy costs. Milgard aluminum windows have a polyurethane channel to reduce heat transfer and improve energy efficiency.

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Milgard Fiberglass Windows

If you are planning a project with large windows in mind, fiberglass is extremely strong and can hold expansive pieces of glass. Milgard regularly tests its fiberglass frame lineals for quality and long-lasting performance.

Fiberglass windows and doors are low-maintenance and resist swelling, rotting, warping and corrosion. They do not require repainting like wood, but the material is paintable if you prefer to change colors down the road.

Fiberglass windows are doors are very energy efficient with low thermal conductivity in your home, for year-round comfort you can rely on.​

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Milgard Vinyl Windows

Milgard vinyl frames are virtually maintenance-free. They include PVC, high quality titanium dioxide, and stabilizers to ensure high performance and energy efficiency.

Milgard vinyl exceed AAMA’s stringent requirements for weather and impact resistance.

Milgard's vinyl compound is produced in controlled environments to exacting standards for high-quality windows and doors you’ll enjoy for years.

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Marvin Aluminum Door & Windows

Extruded aluminum is thicker and more durable than roll form. Thinner aluminum, such as roll form, can dent more easily, and does not offer the structural performance of extruded aluminum.

Marvin extruded aluminum parts are formed first, then painted. This eliminates paint cracks and imperfections and allows for a smooth, uniform finish that evenly covers the curves and angles of the product. The 70% PVDF fluoropolymer acrylic enamel finish is smooth to the touch which distinguishes it from the rough, textured finish on competitive aluminum products.

The PVDF finish meets the highest American Architectural Manufacturers Association (AAMA) 2605 requirements. During the manufacturing process, the PVDF finish is chemically bonded to the aluminum. The PVDF finish is standard for all Ultimate and select Coastline finishes.

To provide uniform durability over time, Marvin Ultimate uses extruded aluminum on all major window components. Some manufacturers choose to cut costs by using lower-quality materials on certain parts. This can lead to quicker chalking and fading and inconsistent weatherability.

Because of its design flexibility, extruded aluminum can be shaped to closely match existing windows or doors in a way that can’t be done with other materials. Extruded aluminum is created by heating aluminum and pushing it through a die which creates a clean, and precise shape. The aluminum is then cut and fabricated into different shapes, sizes, and widths. Roll form aluminum comes on a large roll and is pressed down over a form to create the product components.

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Marvin Wood Door & Windows

‍

Wood is a natural material that offers a sense of warmth and richness in your windows and doors. Choosing wood windows and doors also brings a unique and distinctive quality to any space since no two pieces of wood are exactly alike.

For wood windows and doors, there are two main application types: wood interiors with wood exteriors (typically historic projects with a goal to replicate original wood windows) or, more commonly, wood interiors with aluminum-clad or fiberglass exteriors.

‍

Additional benefits

Wood is resilient and can resist warping when faced with extreme temperature changes. Adding coating and treatment to wood can help protect it for an even longer period of time

Bringing your exact vision to life is possible because wood can be made custom to fit virtually any size or shape, with the most intricate of details

Wood windows and doors provide great insulation

Treatments such as stains and paints work well when applied to wood

For a more sustainable option, wood is a renewable resource

Wood is often perceived as a material that will rot or deteriorate, but that is only the case if it is exposed to moisture for a prolonged period of time

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Marvin Fiberglass Door & Windows

‍

Highest Quality Inputs

The high percentage of lineal fiberglass in Essential, Elevate, and Modern products contributes to the long-term performance. Because of the high concentration of glass, Marvin fiberglass expands and contracts very little regardless of the changing temperatures. This stability means fiberglass windows and doors are less likely to experience seal failures, leaks, and stress cracks.

‍

Category-Leading Performance

Because of their strength, fiberglass frames and sash are typically narrower than other types of frames but are still able to meet the structural performance requirements. More streamlined frames and sashes create an uncluttered aesthetic with less frame, more glass, and bigger views.

‍

A Finish That Lasts

Marvin fiberglass offers a premium, smooth finish – unlike rough textured finishes on some competitive composite products.

Ultrex features an acrylic finish* that is bonded to the fiberglass through a proprietary process. The Ultrex finish protects against fading, chalking, and gloss retention.

The Marvin high-density fiberglass finish** is baked on at extremely high temperatures resulting in a finish that exceeds a high-quality aluminum car paint.


*AAMA 624 verified
**Undergoing AAMA 625 verification

‍

Strength

Ultrex fiberglass is 8x stronger than vinyl and 3x stronger than vinyl/wood composites. Fiberglass is incredibly rigid, which makes it highly impact resistant and capable of standing up to everyday wear and tear, especially in extreme weather conditions.

Fiberglass frames and sashes are less likely to bend and twist helping protect the structural integrity of your home.

‍

Superior Process

Ultrex and Marvin high-density fiberglass are created through a process called pultrusion. The pulling versus pushing action of pultrusion makes it possible for long, lineal glass fibers to become embedded and highly concentrated in the fiberglass as it is pulled through a dye. This high concentration of glass fibers results in superior strength and an exceptionally smooth and durable finish.
